props.name: disabled
props.docs: Specifies if the item is disabled or not, is handled from the parent paginator

props.name: icon
props.docs: Specifies the icon used inside the paginator item

props.name: selected
props.docs: Specifies if the item is selected or not, is handled from the parent paginator

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-background
styles.docs: Sets the background-color of the pages area and the item

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-background-disabled
styles.docs: Sets the background-color of the item when is disabled

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-background-hover
styles.docs: Sets the background-color of the item when the mouse is over it

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-background-selected
styles.docs: Sets the background-color of the item when is selected

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-color
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the component

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-color-disabled
styles.docs: Sets the color of the item when is disabled

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-color-hover
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the item when the mouse is over it

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-color-selected
styles.docs: Sets the text color of the item when is selected

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-radius
styles.docs: Sets the border-radius of the component

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-shadow
styles.docs: Sets the box-shadow of the component

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-shadow-disabled
styles.docs: Sets the box-shadow of the item when is disabled

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-shadow-hover
styles.docs: Sets the box-shadow of the item when the mouse is over it

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-shadow-selected
styles.docs: Sets the box-shadow of the item when is selected

styles.name: --mds-paginator-item-size
styles.docs: Sets the height and the min-width of the paginator item
